_comment: Multi-click move speeds (#385, PR #695). Tailored demo -- see demos/inputs/multi-click-speeds.json.
caption: Multi-click move orders now set a disciplined unit's gait: right-clicking a destination once orders a Walk, twice a Jog, three times a Run, four (or more) times a Sprint -- previously every move order used the same AUTO pace logic (walk, then jog under fire, then sprint at close range) with no way to ask for a specific speed. This clip lines up four identical Cavalry units and sends each on the same 260px move with a different click count: the Walk unit is still ambling along once the Sprint unit has already pulled up at the destination, and the Jog/Run units land in between -- the four lanes visibly pull apart at their own paces (trot/canter/gallop) instead of moving in lockstep.
